name: hb_1_28
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-26 for Zanhuang County and Zhao County compute and store: mean_pm25_zanhuang, mean_aqi_zanhuang, mean_pm25_zhao, mean_aqi_zhao (float).

turns.query: Evaluate environmental quality differences between mountainous Zanhuang County and plain area Zhao County on 2025-06-26.
